title: Delay
description: A video delay line with feedback: the output of N frames ago is mixed back over the present, so echoes of echoes pile up and decay — like looping two VHS decks or pointing a camera at its own monitor. Each echo generation can hue-shift further around the wheel and zoom/rotate slightly, tunnelling the repeats into the frame. Works on a camera, a dropped photo/video, the demo, or the Mixer layers below. Delay length, feedback, dry level, hue shift, zoom and rotation are live and audio-mappable (beats swell the feedback).
